mano_cua.result_summary: 代码编辑器中选中文本时，Hello和world!之间的空格宽度明显比未选中时更宽，确认空格渲染不一致bug
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The space character between words in the code editor appears wider when text is selected/highlighted compared to the unselected state. This is a confirmed visual rendering bug in the code editor's text selection feature. The space width should remain consistent regardless of the selection state, but in the selected state, the space gap is noticeably larger than in the normal state.
